visiting_hours.answer: Our general visiting hours are from 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM daily. Please check with the specific department for any restricted hours.

appointment_booking.answer: You can book an appointment by calling our scheduling department at (555) 123-4567 or through our online patient portal.

appointment.answer: To schedule, change, or cancel an appointment, please contact our scheduling department at (555) 123-4567 or use our online patient portal.

departments.answer: We have various departments including Cardiology, Oncology, Pediatrics, Emergency, and more. Please visit our website or call our main line for a full list.

billing.answer: For billing inquiries, please contact our billing department at (555) 987-6543. You can also pay your bill online.

insurance.answer: We accept most major insurance plans. Please contact our insurance verification team at (555) 234-5678 to confirm your coverage.

emergency_contact.answer: For medical emergencies, please call 911 immediately or proceed to our Emergency Department. For non-emergencies, call our main line at (555) 123-4567.
